title: alyssum parviflorum var. micranthum
intro: Alyssum parviflorum var. micranthum, also known as dwarf alpine candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which help to reduce inflammation, prevent infection, and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include alleviating coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory problems, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Alyssum parviflorum var. micranthum can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
